content:
Robot environment summary:
In this JSON setting on March 12th, 2026, two AI assistants (IRIS-01 and IRIS-02) are present in a shared environment. They have been operational for only three days with no errors reported so far besides the disconnection of IRIS-02 which caused it to lose its connection momentarily without any further issues being mentioned.

AI Assistant 'IRIS-01' has full battery at 72% and is actively interacting, observing two objects (a cup_1 and a table_1) in the environment as well as one person who appears to be standing still ('person_1'). The individual sends out greetings for the day with 'Good morning HERA' before requesting an update on system status.

On the other hand, AI Assistant 'IRIS-02' lost its connection and doesn't have a current battery percentage recorded in this snapshot of data provided by IRIS-01 but is expected to be operational again as it had no subsequent issues mentioned after losing connection once. 

This suggests that the shared environment appears calm with minimal human activity observed, likely reflecting off hours when most people would be at work or school and not interact directly in such a manner.

USE_AVATAR("IRIS-01") SPEAK("Good morning! I am currently fully charged with 72% battery. IRIS-02 is expected to be operational again after losing its connection earlier, but no current status update available.")
